title: AG Mortgage Bank Shareholders Applaud Impressive 2023 Performance - FinancialEDGE
description: Shareholders of AG Mortgage Bank Plc, on Tuesday, commended the board of directors and management for recording an impressive performance during the 2023 financial year. At the bank's 19th Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Lagos, Managing Director Mr. Ngozi Anyogu said, "We are pleased to report outstanding performance in all financial indices, showing positive growth
html: Shareholders of AG Mortgage Bank Plc, on Tuesday, commended the board of directors and management for recording an impressive performance during the 2023 financial year.
